system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation TN 6
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You sit down and meditate for several hours. You then channel Qi through your hands into another person to purge them of spirit possession. This must be used Cathartically. This takes take hours to perform. Cathartic: On a Success you successfully purge a spirit from the target. On a Total Success you purge the spirit and remove all Imbalance Points from the person. On a Failure you take 3 additional Imbalance Points for using this Technique Cathartically. After purging, the target must rest for 12 hours.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: On a Success you successfully purge a spirit from the target. On a Total Success you purge the spirit and remove all Imbalance Points from the person. On a Failure you take 3 additional Imbalance Points for using this Technique Cathartically. After purging, the target must rest for 12 hours.
